$comment: Design token file for the Badge component
$description: Small status indicator overlaid on icons, avatars, or nav items. Three types: Hint (solid dot), Label (numeric count), and icon (zap icon). Two sizes: md and sm. Four themes: Primary (blue), Success (green), Warning (yellow), Error (red). No nested components from the same file — fully self-contained.

border-radius.description: Fully rounded pill/circle shape applied to all badge types

background.description: #2970ff — blue background for primary-theme Label and icon badges

foreground.description: White icon and label text on blue background

background.description: #027a48 — dark green background for success-theme Label and icon badges

foreground.description: White icon and label text on dark green background

background.description: #fec84b — yellow background for warning-theme Label and icon badges

foreground.description: #101828 — dark text and icon on yellow background for sufficient contrast

background.description: #d92d20 — red background for error-theme Label and icon badges

foreground.description: White icon and label text on red background

md.description: Width and height of the medium dot indicator

sm.description: Width and height of the small dot indicator

typography.description: 12px Medium, 17px line-height — numeric count inside the badge

height.description: Fixed height of the medium label badge

padding-horizontal.description: Left and right padding inside the medium label badge

padding-vertical.description: Top and bottom padding inside the medium label badge

height.description: Fixed height of the small label badge

padding-horizontal.description: Left and right padding inside the small label badge

md.description: Inset padding around the icon inside the medium icon badge

sm.description: Inset padding around the icon inside the small icon badge

md.description: Width and height of the icon inside the medium icon badge

sm.description: Width and height of the icon inside the small icon badge
